keywords: stainless steel fasteners Africa, 304 stainless, 316 stainless, coastal fasteners, marine grade fasteners

heading.en: Why Use Stainless Steel Fasteners in Africa?

body.en:
Stainless steel fasteners offer superior corrosion resistance essential for African applications:

1. Coastal Environments: Salt air in coastal cities (Durban, Lagos, Mombasa, Dar es Salaam) rapidly corrodes carbon steel. 316 stainless steel is essential.

2. Humid Tropical Climate: High humidity in Central African regions accelerates corrosion. 304 stainless is minimum recommendation.

3. Chemical Exposure: Agricultural facilities and mining operations expose fasteners to corrosive substances.

4. Longevity Requirements: Infrastructure projects require fasteners that last decades without replacement.

5. Aesthetic Requirements: Visible fastener installations in architectural projects need corrosion-free appearance.

TradeGo offers both 304 and 316 stainless steel fasteners with competitive pricing for African markets.

heading.en: 304 vs 316 Stainless Steel: Which to Choose?

body.en:
Understanding the difference helps buyers select correctly:

304 Stainless Steel:
- Composition: 18% chromium, 8% nickel
- Corrosion resistance: Good for most indoor and outdoor applications
- Temperature range: -185°C to 870°C
- Cost: 20-30% less than 316
- Applications: General construction, roofing, interior applications

316 Stainless Steel:
- Composition: 16% chromium, 10% nickel, 2% molybdenum
- Corrosion resistance: Excellent, especially in chloride environments
- Temperature range: -185°C to 800°C
- Molybdenum addition: Resists pitting from saltwater
- Applications: Coastal, marine, chemical, healthcare facilities

For African coastal and humid tropical applications, 316 is strongly recommended.

TradeGo stocks comprehensive stainless steel fastener range:

Bolts: Hex bolts DIN 933, carriage bolts DIN 603, eye bolts
Nuts: Hex nuts DIN 934, flange nuts DIN 6923, lock nuts
Screws: Machine screws, self-tapping screws, deck screws
Washers: Flat washers DIN 125, spring washers DIN 127, lock washers
Threaded Rod: Full thread and partial thread rods

Sizes: M5 to M36 metric, #10 to 1" imperial
Grades: A2-70 (304), A4-70 (316), A4-80 (high strength 316)

Custom packaging available for retail distribution.

316 Stainless Steel:

Prices 30-40% lower than European suppliers.

Container quantities (500kg+) qualify for volume discounts.
